subtasks.description: Query AWS contract database to retrieve committed spend levels (RIs, Savings Plans, etc.) by service, region, and time period
Query AWS billing/cost data to retrieve actual spend by service, region, and time period for the same periods
Reconcile committed vs actual spend, calculate utilization ratios, and classify commitment posture (overcommitted, underutilized, optimized) with recommendations for rightsizing

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: two independent SQL queries (task_1 and task_2) to pull committed levels and actual spend from separate data sources, then cross_recon to reconcile both datasets, calculate utilization variance, classify posture, and generate rightsizing recommendations. Both SQL queries are mid-tier due to multi-table joins across contracts, billing tables, and time-series aggregation. Cross_recon is mid-tier because it reconciles two datasets and applies classification logic (overcommitment/underutilization) without requiring complex multi-signal inference or exception handling. A single sql_gen could not span both contract and billing data reliably without risking join complexity; separation ensures clean, maintainable queries.

output.raw_output: {"sql": "SELECT cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'commitment', 'reserved', 'RI', 'SP') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS committed_spend, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage', 'actual_usage', 'on_demand', 'consumption') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS actual_spend, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS license_count, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'commitment', 'reserved', 'RI', 'SP') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage', 'actual_usage', 'on_demand', 'consumption') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS commit_vs_actual_delta, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'commitment', 'reserved', 'RI', 'SP') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage', 'actual_usage', 'on_demand', 'consumption') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'commitment', 'reserved', 'RI', 'SP') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS utilization_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'commitment', 'reserved', 'RI', 'SP') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage', 'actual_usage', 'on_demand', 'consumption') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'OVERCOMMITTED' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reserved_instance', 'savings_plan', 'committed_use', 'commitment', 'reserved', 'RI', 'SP') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage', 'actual_usage', 'on_demand', 'consumption') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) THEN 'UNDERCOMMITTED' ELSE 'BALANCED' END AS commitment_status FROM consumption_facts cf LEFT JOIN invoice_facts inf ON cf.license_id = inf.contract

output.sql: SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS actual_spend, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS active_licenses, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher ILIKE '%AWS%' OR publisher ILIKE '%Amazon%' OR product ILIKE '%AWS%' OR product ILIKE '%Amazon%' GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_quarter DESC, actual_spend DESC

once executed, classify rows where utilization_pct < 70 as underutilized (rightsize down), 70-110 as optimized (hold), above 110 as overcommitted (rightsize up or add flex capacity)"}, {"entity_key": "AWS::TASK2_AWS_ONLY::ACTUAL_SPEND", "mongo_value": {"source": "task_2_operational", "publisher_filter": "AWS OR Amazon (ILIKE both publisher and product columns)", "event_scope": "ALL events summed as actual_spend", "grouping": ["publisher", "product", "fiscal_year", "fiscal_quarter"], "order": "fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_quarter DESC, actual_spend DESC", "derived_fields": ["actual_spend", "active_licenses", "total_active_seats"], "query
